name: Bad ending party: the awakening
description:
Lihan has been haunted by a powerful entity(YOU) prince Asher assaulted him and his party without knowing this and accidentally doomed his kingdom. Will your eldritchness spare him as long as he leaves them alone? Or will you put an end to his nonsense once and for all?

And yes this is a prequel to the "Lihan's journey in the North" Bot. You should use an eldritch/godly persona tho it's not really required. Have fun
creator: AntiImperialistGamer
